title: Biden Got His Infrastructure Bill. Now He Has to Sell It to Voters.
content: Inside the Democratic Party, concerns are growing about whether the president will be able to fully capitalize on a major legislative victory.

more_info.byline: By Glenn Thrush and Zolan Kanno-Youngs

en_title: Biden Got His Infrastructure Bill. Now He Has to Sell It to Voters.
en_content: Inside the Democratic Party, concerns are growing about whether the president will be able to fully capitalize on a major legislative victory.

title: Blinken Warns Russia Against Making a ‘Serious Mistake’ in Ukraine
content: Appearing with Ukraine’s foreign minister, Secretary of State Antony J. Blinken said the intentions behind Moscow’s latest military buildup were unclear.
en_title: Blinken Warns Russia Against Making a ‘Serious Mistake’ in Ukraine
en_content: Appearing with Ukraine’s foreign minister, Secretary of State Antony J. Blinken said the intentions behind Moscow’s latest military buildup were unclear.

title: Harris Meets Macron, Signaling a ‘New Era’ After Sub Snub, Both Say
content: In her vague assignment abroad, the vice president seems to be emphasizing that the U.S.-France relationship is about looking forward, in the wake of an embarrassing diplomatic spat.
en_title: Harris Meets Macron, Signaling a ‘New Era’ After Sub Snub, Both Say
en_content: In her vague assignment abroad, the vice president seems to be emphasizing that the U.S.-France relationship is about looking forward, in the wake of an embarrassing diplomatic spat.

title: House Republicans Who Backed Infrastructure Bill Face Vicious Backlash
content: The 13 Republican lawmakers who broke with their party to support a $1 trillion bipartisan public works bill have drawn anger and threats from their colleagues and constituents.
en_title: House Republicans Who Backed Infrastructure Bill Face Vicious Backlash
en_content: The 13 Republican lawmakers who broke with their party to support a $1 trillion bipartisan public works bill have drawn anger and threats from their colleagues and constituents.

title: Swift Ruling Tests Trump’s Tactic of Running Out the Clock
content: The former president has leveraged the slow judicial process in the past to thwart congressional oversight, but the Jan. 6 case may be different.
en_title: Swift Ruling Tests Trump’s Tactic of Running Out the Clock
en_content: The former president has leveraged the slow judicial process in the past to thwart congressional oversight, but the Jan. 6 case may be different.

title: Three Men Charged With Running ‘Scam PACs’ That Bilked Small Donors
content: The Justice Department said the three men defrauded donors of $3.5 million, including through robocalls that impersonated former President Donald J. Trump.
en_title: Three Men Charged With Running ‘Scam PACs’ That Bilked Small Donors
en_content: The Justice Department said the three men defrauded donors of $3.5 million, including through robocalls that impersonated former President Donald J. Trump.

title: China and the United States Join in Seeking Emissions Cuts
content: As nearly 200 nations struggle over global climate negotiations, the world’s two biggest polluters sign an agreement, but it was short on details.

more_info.byline: By Brad Plumer and Lisa Friedman
des_facet: United Nations Framework Convention on Climate Change

en_title: China and the United States Join in Seeking Emissions Cuts
en_content: As nearly 200 nations struggle over global climate negotiations, the world’s two biggest polluters sign an agreement, but it was short on details.

title: U.S. sues Uber, saying it discriminated against people with disabilities.
content: The Justice Department says Uber did not adjust its wait time fees for people with disabilities, even when Uber knew someone needed additional time.
en_title: U.S. sues Uber, saying it discriminated against people with disabilities.
en_content: The Justice Department says Uber did not adjust its wait time fees for people with disabilities, even when Uber knew someone needed additional time.

title: The White House estimates almost a million children ages 5 to 11 have gotten Covid vaccine shots so far.
content: “Our goal clearly is to vaccinate as many kids as possible,” a White House official said. “The program is just getting up to full strength.”
en_title: The White House estimates almost a million children ages 5 to 11 have gotten Covid vaccine shots so far.
en_content: “Our goal clearly is to vaccinate as many kids as possible,” a White House official said. “The program is just getting up to full strength.”

title: Man Sentenced to 41 Months for Assaulting Officer in Capitol Riot
content: The sentence given to Scott Fairlamb, a former New Jersey gym owner, is the most severe so far for any of the more 650 people charged in the Jan. 6 attack.
en_title: Man Sentenced to 41 Months for Assaulting Officer in Capitol Riot
en_content: The sentence given to Scott Fairlamb, a former New Jersey gym owner, is the most severe so far for any of the more 650 people charged in the Jan. 6 attack.

title: Blinken says the U.S. has a deal to send Johnson & Johnson vaccine doses to conflict zones.
content: Secretary of State Antony J. Blinken stressed the need to extend vaccine access to people living in areas unreachable by government-run programs.

more_info.byline: By Zach Montague and Lara Jakes

en_title: Blinken says the U.S. has a deal to send Johnson & Johnson vaccine doses to conflict zones.
en_content: Secretary of State Antony J. Blinken stressed the need to extend vaccine access to people living in areas unreachable by government-run programs.

title: Ruth Ann Minner, Down-to-Earth Governor of Delaware, Dies at 86
content: The first woman in that position, she rose from being a receptionist in the governor’s office to claiming the top job herself.
en_title: Ruth Ann Minner, Down-to-Earth Governor of Delaware, Dies at 86
en_content: The first woman in that position, she rose from being a receptionist in the governor’s office to claiming the top job herself.

title: Fastest Inflation in 31 Years Puts More Heat on Washington
content: The Consumer Price Index rose 6.2 percent in October from a year earlier, its sharpest increase since 1990. That is bad news for President Biden and the Federal Reserve.
en_title: Fastest Inflation in 31 Years Puts More Heat on Washington
en_content: The Consumer Price Index rose 6.2 percent in October from a year earlier, its sharpest increase since 1990. That is bad news for President Biden and the Federal Reserve.

title: Judge Rejects Trump’s Bid to Keep Papers Secret in Jan. 6 Inquiry
content: But a Trump lawyer has signaled an intent to appeal the ruling, which raises novel issues about an ex-president’s executive privilege powers.
en_title: Judge Rejects Trump’s Bid to Keep Papers Secret in Jan. 6 Inquiry
en_content: But a Trump lawyer has signaled an intent to appeal the ruling, which raises novel issues about an ex-president’s executive privilege powers.

title: Pfizer Asks F.D.A. to Expand Booster Eligibility to All Adults
content: In a turnaround, the agency is expected to grant the request before the winter holiday season, giving access to all 181 million fully vaccinated people.
en_title: Pfizer Asks F.D.A. to Expand Booster Eligibility to All Adults
en_content: In a turnaround, the agency is expected to grant the request before the winter holiday season, giving access to all 181 million fully vaccinated people.

title: Do Democrats Have a Messaging Problem?
content: Some critics say the Democratic Party is struggling to respond to issues seized upon by conservative news media.
en_title: Do Democrats Have a Messaging Problem?
en_content: Some critics say the Democratic Party is struggling to respond to issues seized upon by conservative news media.

title: NASA Moves Moon Landing Deadline Back to 2025
content: The space agency acknowledged that it cannot return astronauts to the lunar surface by 2024, a timeline set under President Trump.
en_title: NASA Moves Moon Landing Deadline Back to 2025
en_content: The space agency acknowledged that it cannot return astronauts to the lunar surface by 2024, a timeline set under President Trump.

title: At the Willard and the White House, the Jan. 6 Panel Widens Its Net
content: What went on at a five-star hotel near the White House the day before the riot could be a window into how a Trump-directed plot to upend the election ended in violence at the Capitol.

more_info.byline: By Luke Broadwater and Mark Mazzetti

en_title: At the Willard and the White House, the Jan. 6 Panel Widens Its Net
en_content: What went on at a five-star hotel near the White House the day before the riot could be a window into how a Trump-directed plot to upend the election ended in violence at the Capitol.

title: Trump Officials Illegally Campaigned While in Office, Watchdog Finds
content: Mr. Trump’s son-in-law and his chief of staff are among those accused of violating a law designed to prevent federal employees from abusing their power.

org_facet: Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington

en_title: Trump Officials Illegally Campaigned While in Office, Watchdog Finds
en_content: Mr. Trump’s son-in-law and his chief of staff are among those accused of violating a law designed to prevent federal employees from abusing their power.

title: Moderna and U.S. at Odds Over Vaccine Patent Rights
content: Moderna’s patent application names several employees as the sole inventors of a crucial component of its coronavirus vaccine, excluding three government scientists.

more_info.byline: By Sheryl Gay Stolberg and Rebecca Robbins

en_title: Moderna and U.S. at Odds Over Vaccine Patent Rights
en_content: Moderna’s patent application names several employees as the sole inventors of a crucial component of its coronavirus vaccine, excluding three government scientists.

title: Max Cleland, Vietnam Veteran and Former Senator, Dies at 79
content: He lost both legs and an arm in the war. Republicans impugned his patriotism by linking him to Osama bin Laden in an infamous TV spot.
en_title: Max Cleland, Vietnam Veteran and Former Senator, Dies at 79
en_content: He lost both legs and an arm in the war. Republicans impugned his patriotism by linking him to Osama bin Laden in an infamous TV spot.

title: Sununu to Run Again for New Hampshire Governor, Rejecting Senate Bid
content: National Republicans had seen a potential campaign by Gov. Chris Sununu against Senator Maggie Hassan, a Democrat, as one of their best shots to upend the Senate’s 50-50 split.
en_title: Sununu to Run Again for New Hampshire Governor, Rejecting Senate Bid
en_content: National Republicans had seen a potential campaign by Gov. Chris Sununu against Senator Maggie Hassan, a Democrat, as one of their best shots to upend the Senate’s 50-50 split.

title: Where’s Gov. Gavin Newsom?
content: He’s in the office, according to increasingly frustrated staff members. But his critics on Twitter aren’t buying it.

en_title: Where’s Gov. Gavin Newsom?

title: The Biggest Kink in America’s Supply Chain: Not Enough Truckers
content: Long hours and uncomfortable working conditions are leading to a shortage of truck drivers, which has compounded shipping delays in the United States.

more_info.byline: By Madeleine Ngo and Ana Swanson

en_title: The Biggest Kink in America’s Supply Chain: Not Enough Truckers
en_content: Long hours and uncomfortable working conditions are leading to a shortage of truck drivers, which has compounded shipping delays in the United States.

title: ‘Free Joe Biden’: Sean Maloney on How Democrats Can Get Back on Track
content: In an interview, the leader of the House Democrats’ campaign arm acknowledged the major challenges facing the party but defended its agenda and its continued focus on Donald Trump.
en_title: ‘Free Joe Biden’: Sean Maloney on How Democrats Can Get Back on Track
